Caption: Principles and mechanisms of photoacoustic imaging. Note: This equation “ I a = α I 0 ” describes the energy conversion process from laser energy to acoustic pressure, elucidating how tissue, upon irradiation by a short-pulsed laser with a certain energy ( I 0 ), absorbs part of the laser energy. The amount of absorbed light energy ( I a ) is directly proportional to the tissue's absorption coefficient ( α ), as captured by the equation I a = α I 0 .
